## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content production, SEO performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track, with \~200 articles updated and new topics planned](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [No significant SEO losses post-website launch; some gains in top 10 visibility](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [PSEO template expected by Monday; engineering team prioritizing pipeline setup](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Experimenting with FAQ and TLDR sections; outline in progress](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Updates

  - [On track with monthly deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Joseph publishing approved content](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Shifted focus to hybrid deployment and data sovereignty topics](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Updated framework for CTAs implemented](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Airtable being used for content tracking and topic planning](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

### Website and SEO Performance

  - [No substantial keyword loss post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Gains in top 10 visibility and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [5 high-volume keywords potentially lost; to be investigated](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Google's recent parameter handling change complicates analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - Conversion rates: \<1% for talk-to-sales, \>1% for cloud signups

### Technical Issues and Solutions

  - [Tables and code snippets fixed on \~200 pages](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Manual publishing required for pages with tables/code snippets due to Webflow limitations](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Considering programmatic solutions for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)

### Upcoming Initiatives

  - [PSEO template expected by Monday; engineering team prioritizing](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [FAQ and TLDR experiment outline in progress](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Plans to update connector pages with use cases and FAQs](https://fathom.video/share/zktM2ax2vm9xMRqxRYz7MAvoA1Foyg5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
